######################################################################################
# Full dataset iteration 4 - big-hammer RO - S005_STAND_FP06_c05_ro_58680
# Source batch: STAND_FP06 | Floorplan: FP06 | Original config: 5
#
# Auto-generated by gen_single_job_cmake.py - do not edit manually
######################################################################################

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.5)
set(CYT_DIR ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/../../../../../../)
set(CMAKE_MODULE_PATH ${CMAKE_MODULE_PATH} ${CYT_DIR}/cmake)
find_package(CoyoteHW REQUIRED)

project(S005_STAND_FP06_c05_ro_58680)
message("*** Full dataset iteration 4 - big-hammer RO: S005_STAND_FP06_c05_ro_58680 ***")

set(FDEV_NAME   "u55c")
set(N_REGIONS   1)
set(EN_PR       1)
set(N_CONFIG    1)
set(EN_STRM     1)
set(N_STRM_AXI  2)
set(EN_MEM      0)

set(FPLAN_PATH "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/floorplans/FP06_upper_trim_top.xdc")

validation_checks_hw()

load_apps(
    VFPGA_C0_0   "apps/standalone/ro_58680"   # original STAND_FP06 config 5, N_RO=58680
)

create_hw()
